heading: Transferred
label: 57b Transferred
notes: CodificationSection 57b was editorially reclassified as .section 5341 of this title

Prior ProvisionsA prior section 57b, , , , provided that, effective , Committee on House Oversight of House of Representatives had authority to combine House of Representatives Clerk Hire Allowance, Official Expenses Allowance, and Official Mail Allowance into single allowance, to be known as the “Members’ Representational Allowance” and to prescribe regulations relating to allocations, expenditures, and other matters with respect to Members’ Representational Allowance.Pub. L. 104–53, title III, § 314109 Stat. 538Nov. 19, 1995Sept. 1, 1995
